official_public_docs_or_observed_endpoin: Observed StateJobsNY public dated HTML table.
source_discovery_method: use configured agency/board URL and official/list endpoint where visible
detail_fetch_method: detail fetch for date/location only when fixture-backed and polite
pagination_method: respect source page controls; do not brute-force ids
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: list-payload: Use vacancyDetailsView.cfm?id=... or the table Item # as stable source_job_id.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: detail-page: Use detail City and State labels for public geo; preserve list County as county evidence only.
country_region_city_rule: detail-page: Detail City plus State gives city/region and United States country; county-only list rows stay non-public unless another explicit remote/geo signal exists.
remote_type_rule: detail-page: Map exact Telecommuting allowed? Yes to hybrid and No to onsite; do not infer remote/hybrid from county-only list rows.
posting_date_rule: list-payload: Use the Posted column from the dated table; do not invent dates.
rate_limit: strict public-board rate limit with long cooldown after 429/403

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: source remains disabled/collect-when-disabled off; public writes require live canary proof that detail-backed geo/telecommuting evidence exists and county-only rows stay quarantined

quarantine_reason: hold/quarantine recommendation: strict raw fixture exists, but source has zero live rows and detail volume/field quality are unproven

runner_interface.discover: use configured agency/board URL and official/list endpoint where visible
runner_interface.fetchDetail: detail fetch for date/location only when fixture-backed and polite
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: run bounded live canary/estimate only after explicit approval; otherwise target CalCareers next for public-sector extraction
certification_blockers: live canary quality and detail fetch volume unproven
